title: 主役はみなさまお祭りワッショイ！

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Trainer, look at how excited everyone is!
Oh, oops!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can't get ahead of myself just yet. The Gratitude
Festival begins tomorrow. We have to make sure
we finish all the final checks by today!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Yay, I did it, I did it! I won!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Welcome, you two! I'm so glad to see you
here!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Want to try your luck? You get a free
chocolate-covered banana if you can beat me in
a round of rock, paper, scissors, and you get an
extra if the stick has "WINNER!" written on it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
A certain someone told me people tend to gather
in places with fun atmospheres, and business has
been booming thanks to that advice!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's great! Ehehe! The hustle and bustle drew us
over here, so it seems we aren't immune to it
either!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to try my luck! I'm gonna win a
bunch!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Phew! So many victories and "WINNER!" sticks. I'm
absolutely stuffed! Let's get moving so I can burn
off—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Eeeheeheehee! Welcome, welcome! I've been
waiting for you! Prepare to be frightened out of
your skin!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: The haunted house! R-right, we need to check that too. I've already gone through it before, so it won't scare me that much!
I want... your speedy legs...
GIVE ME YOUR LEEEEGSSS!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: EEEEEK!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer, we gotta get out here! FAST! NOW! GO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn to run, but as I do, I feel my body lift off
the floor...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... huff... pant... W-we made it out alive!
choice_data_list: I didn't expect you to carry me out!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry... I just threw you over my shoulder
without realizing it! I didn't think we would make
it out in time if I just pulled you by the hand...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Sorry! I can't believe I just hauled you
around like a sack of rice... Hehehe... Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Kitasan Black and I check out the rest
of the festival and the night passes by in the blink
of an eye...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Festivals really are the best!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I've had my fill of food and laughter! I got to yell
and holler all I wanted, and everyone was so
excited... I had a great time.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wait! Oh nooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, oh no, oh noooo! We got so absorbed in
having fun that I forgot we were supposed to be
doing final checks around the place!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text: Nah, don't sweat it, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All right, folks. All together on three, two, one...

text_block_list.name: Shopping District Staff
text_block_list.text:
We did it!
"Operation: Make Kita Have a Great Time!" is a
huge success!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Operation what?! Wait... Does that mean
putting me in charge of doing final checks was
just a ploy to make me enjoy myself?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well, we knew if we invited you two normally, you
probably would've tried to help out as a way to
pay us back for the invitation.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text:
So instead, we thought it'd be better to just
create a temporary role for you and trick you into
coming!
choice_data_list: That's so thoughtful of you all...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you got us. I don't know what to say...
Ahem.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm so, so happy!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You all put so much of yourselves into this
festival, and it was so fun! Seriously, I had a blast!
choice_data_list: It's all thanks to you, Kitasan!
It's all thanks to you, Kitasan!
You sure went through a lot, though, huh?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You all put so much of yourselves into this
festival, and it was so fun! Seriously, I had a blast!
choice_data_list: It's all thanks to you, Kitasan!
It's all thanks to you, Kitasan!
You sure went through a lot, though, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Goodness, you two are so in sync.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I don't think anyone can compete with how
close you two are.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Hmm... I guess you're right! You won't find
two better friends on more equal wavelengths!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: My, now you're just showing off!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well, it's the truth! Trainer, you're always
by my side because you feel the same, right?

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text:
All right, keep showing us that awesome
teamwork!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Will do! We'll do our very best together, so I
hope you'll keep cheering us on!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Thank you! I appreciate the praise, but you
know what?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You can't pull off a festival all on your own.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
A festival is a group effort, built when you answer
the festival's cheers with your own. I learned that
from watching my dad in action...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
In other words, the joy we're feeling now is thanks
to everyone combining their energy and working
toward a common goal!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper B
text_block_list.text: Sniffle! Hehe, that's our Kita! Your words really hit me deep!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you can cry after our resounding
success tomorrow! Let's make it a day to
remember!

text_block_list.name: Shopping District Staff
text_block_list.text: YEAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone pumps their fists in the air. The passion
and unity they display on the night before the
festival is quite a moving sight to behold.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: W-well, you know! It wasn't... that bad...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Are you talking about the haunted house?
The way you reacted while going through it was
really something!
choice_data_list: You were in and out of there in a flash!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
No kidding. You set a record for time taken to
get through the haunted house.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Umm... Er...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm going to redeem myself by going through a
different haunted house!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So, uh, I'd really appreciate it if you could stick
with me until I manage to conquer my fear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her honest personality draws warm laughter from
those around her. And I feel like I’ve just
discovered yet another reason why everyone’s so
fond of her.
